headline: Broadridge launches on-chain proxy voting on Avalanche, Galaxy first to use it
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE: BR), a global technology leader that processes $8 trillion in tokenized assets every month, is expanding its reach into the digital asset space. On Monday, April 6, the company announced that its governance platform now supports digital assets, allowing public ...

headline: Tokenized Stocks Take Next Step With First On-Chain Vote for Galaxy Shareholders
summary: Holders of tokenized shares in Galaxy (GLXY) will soon be able to participate in proxy voting on-chain via Broadridge.

headline: Needham Reiterates Buy on Broadridge Financial, Maintains $255 Price Target
summary: Needham  analyst Kyle Peterson   reiterates Broadridge Financial (NYSE:BR) with a Buy and maintains $255 price target.
